name: dev-workflows
description: A library of composable workflow skills distilled from cross-project Claude Code sessions (44 skills). Spans planning and spec authoring, multi-lens review and audit, testing/QA and DB seeding, browser and Figma workflows, environment/setup/deployment, git hygiene, corpus and document pipelines, capability inventory, and memory/status utilities. Primitives (e.g. env-check, parallel-audit, db-seed, figma-inventory, scope-guard) compose into higher-level workflows. Windows-aware (forward-slash bash paths, .venv interpreter, cp1252 encoding, Playwright MCP gotchas).
